reviews.comment:
Mediocre el servicio para ser el único ACA en Neuquén capital, muchas veces no atienden con tarjetas, solo efectivo y te hacen esperar una eternidad en los cambios de turno del personal

(Translated by Google)
The service is mediocre for being the only ACA in Neuquén capital; they often don't accept cards, only cash, and make you wait forever during staff shift changes.

reviews.comment:
Nunca atienden los telefonos. si sos tercero te tienen mas de 120 dias para reconocerte el valor del arreglo. te tiran un presupuesto de menos de la mitad de  lo que sale.
la atencion una porqueria.

(Translated by Google)
They never answer the phones. If you're a third party, they take over 120 days to reimburse you for the repair. They give you an estimate for less than half of what it's worth.
The service is terrible.
